highlighted_projects.description: Built a full-stack job tracking platform using Next.js and PostgreSQL to manage and analyze thousands of job applications through dashboards, metrics, and reminder workflows. Designed a relational PostgreSQL schema using Prisma ORM to support efficient SQL queries and scalable CRUD operations. Developed backend APIs with Next.js and implemented secure authentication using Firebase Google login with session-based access control. To streamline job data entry, built Chrome and Firefox browser extensions that allow users to save job postings to the platform with one click. The application was deployed on Vercel with automated CI/CD pipelines, while the PostgreSQL database is managed using Supabase, and the platform is live at JobOrca.com.
highlighted_projects.name: JobOrca

highlighted_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end machine learning web application to predict diabetes using TensorFlow in Python, with a FastAPI backend and a .NET frontend for user interaction. Built an ETL pipeline to clean and transform a healthcare dataset, handling missing values and outliers to prepare data for model training. The application was containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS ECS Fargate, while the trained model was served through an Amazon SageMaker endpoint for real-time inference. Infrastructure provisioning and deployment were automated using Terraform to manage AWS resources in a scalable and reproducible manner.
highlighted_projects.name: DiabetiScan

jarvis_projects.description: Built a Linux cluster monitoring system to collect and analyze hardware and system usage data across multiple servers. The project involved writing Bash scripts to gather CPU, memory, disk, and operating system information, and automating recurring data collection using cron jobs on Linux machines. To ensure consistent and portable deployment, a PostgreSQL database was containerized using Docker, with relational schemas designed to efficiently store monitoring data. SQL queries were then used to analyze resource usage trends and provide insights into the overall health and performance of the cluster.
jarvis_projects.name: Cluster Monitor

jarvis_projects.description: Implemented a Java-based text searching application inspired by the Unix grep command that efficiently scans directories and processes files line by line using regular expressions. The application avoids loading entire files into memory by streaming file contents, significantly improving performance and memory usage when working with large directories. It was designed around a clean interface to define the core processing flow, with multiple implementations using traditional loops and Java Streams to compare approaches. The project was built with core Java, managed with Maven, and containerized using Docker to ensure consistent and portable execution across environments.
jarvis_projects.name: Core Java Apps

jarvis_projects.description: Analyzed historical retail transaction data using Python and Jupyter Notebook to uncover customer purchasing patterns and sales trends. Applied data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and RFM-based customer segmentation using Pandas and NumPy, and transformed OLTP data into analytics-ready OLAP structures to support data-driven marketing and revenue optimization.
jarvis_projects.name: Data Analytics

jarvis_projects.description: Built a full-stack trading dashboard using React and Flask to manage trader accounts and simulate financial operations. Developed RESTful APIs to create, retrieve, deposit, withdraw, and delete trader records, and integrated them with a responsive React interface using Axios. Implemented dynamic routing and state management for trader profiles, real-time dashboard updates, and quote visualization using Ant Design tables, with Flask-CORS enabling seamless client–server communication.
jarvis_projects.name: React Trading Dashboard

name: Ebrahim Azarbar

professional_experience.description: Developed backend and data engineering applications in a structured software development program, working extensively with Linux, Python, SQL, Docker, and cloud technologies. Designed and implemented systems including a Linux cluster monitoring solution using Bash scripting and PostgreSQL, and developed data processing workflows using Python for analysis and transformation tasks. Built performance-focused core Java applications emphasizing clean architecture and memory-efficient processing. Collaborated in an Agile-style environment with code reviews, version control using Git, and technical documentation, while applying best practices for testing, containerization, and deployment.
professional_experience.title: Software Developer

professional_experience.description: Engineered and deployed cloud-based web applications to remotely visualize real-time industrial data for monitoring and diagnostics, leveraging AWS services such as EC2, VPC, RDS, and S3. Designed highly available infrastructure by deploying EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones with Auto Scaling Groups and load balancing, and built a fault tolerant PostgreSQL database on Amazon RDS using Multi-AZ and read replicas to improve availability and read performance. Implemented cost-optimization strategies by developing AWS Lambda functions to archive historical data from RDS to Amazon S3 and Glacier using lifecycle policies. Improved system reliability and incident response by monitoring infrastructure metrics with Amazon CloudWatch and integrating alerting through Amazon SNS.
professional_experience.title: Software Engineer

summary: My name is Ebrahim Azarbar and I am a Computer Science graduate from York University. During my studies I built a strong foundation in programming, data structures, and systems concepts. I have professional experience working as a software engineer at Hivelink Tech Solution where I worked on backend development, cloud infrastructure, and deploying applications using AWS. What excites me about software is the ability to turn ideas into working systems that people actually use. I enjoy problem solving, learning how things work under the hood, and improving systems over time. I am motivated by continuous learning and hands-on experience.
